_note: 100 personality traits: 70 positive (type=pos), 30 negative (type=neg). Characters get 5 at random. Weight 1 = equal probability within type pool.

traits.name: Adaptable
traits.desc: Adjusts quickly to new situations without losing composure

traits.name: Ambitious
traits.desc: Driven to achieve more than the bare minimum; sets internal goals

traits.name: Analytical
traits.desc: Breaks problems into parts before acting; rarely rushes conclusions

traits.name: Attentive
traits.desc: Notices things others miss; remembers small details

traits.name: Bold
traits.desc: Acts decisively when others hesitate; discomfort doesn't stop them

traits.name: Brave
traits.desc: Moves toward danger when necessary, even when afraid

traits.name: Calm
traits.desc: Rarely raises their voice; processes stress internally rather than externally

traits.name: Careful
traits.desc: Checks twice, acts once; prefers not to undo preventable mistakes

traits.name: Caring
traits.desc: Actively concerned with the wellbeing of those around them

traits.name: Charismatic
traits.desc: People are drawn to them naturally; makes others feel heard

traits.name: Collected
traits.desc: Maintains their composure under pressure; controlled breathing, steady hands

traits.name: Compassionate
traits.desc: Genuinely feels what others are going through; motivated by it

traits.name: Confident
traits.desc: Trusts their own judgment; doesn't constantly seek reassurance

traits.name: Cooperative
traits.desc: Works well within a group; doesn't need credit to contribute

traits.name: Courageous
traits.desc: Acts on principle even when the cost is personal risk

traits.name: Creative
traits.desc: Finds unconventional solutions; pattern-matches across unrelated domains

traits.name: Decisive
traits.desc: Can commit to a course of action; doesn't get stuck in loops

traits.name: Dedicated
traits.desc: Sees things through even when momentum is gone

traits.name: Determined
traits.desc: Doesn't stop when blocked; recalibrates and tries again

traits.name: Diplomatic
traits.desc: Navigates disagreements without creating new enemies

traits.name: Disciplined
traits.desc: Follows through on commitments even without external pressure

traits.name: Empathetic
traits.desc: Understands others' emotional states and accounts for them

traits.name: Energetic
traits.desc: Maintains high output without needing frequent recovery

traits.name: Fair
traits.desc: Applies the same standards to themselves as to others

traits.name: Focused
traits.desc: Locks onto a task and filters out irrelevant noise

traits.name: Forthright
traits.desc: Volunteers relevant information; doesn't wait to be asked

traits.name: Generous
traits.desc: Gives resources, time, and effort without calculating return

traits.name: Hardworking
traits.desc: Output doesn't depend on mood or circumstance

traits.name: Honest
traits.desc: Tells the truth even when a comfortable lie would be easier

traits.name: Humorous
traits.desc: Finds something to laugh at; lightens situations without trivializing them

traits.name: Imaginative
traits.desc: Conceptualizes possibilities others haven't considered

traits.name: Innovative
traits.desc: Improves processes and tools rather than accepting them as fixed

traits.name: Intuitive
traits.desc: Arrives at correct conclusions through pattern recognition, not calculation

traits.name: Level-headed
traits.desc: Doesn't amplify crises; keeps perspective when others lose it

traits.name: Logical
traits.desc: Reaches conclusions through reasoning; resists emotional distortion

traits.name: Loyal
traits.desc: Doesn't abandon people or commitments when things get difficult

traits.name: Methodical
traits.desc: Works through problems systematically; doesn't skip steps

traits.name: Meticulous
traits.desc: Attends to precision; errors caused by carelessness are rare

traits.name: Nurturing
traits.desc: Actively supports others' growth and recovery

traits.name: Observant
traits.desc: Reads the room accurately; picks up on nonverbal signals

traits.name: Open-minded
traits.desc: Updates their model when new evidence arrives; not defensive about being wrong

traits.name: Optimistic
traits.desc: Defaults to believing things can work out; resilient to setbacks

traits.name: Patient
traits.desc: Waits without deteriorating; doesn't force premature conclusions

traits.name: Perceptive
traits.desc: Understands what's actually being said, not just what's stated

traits.name: Persistent
traits.desc: Returns to a problem after failure without losing conviction

traits.name: Pragmatic
traits.desc: Prioritizes what works over what's theoretically ideal

traits.name: Principled
traits.desc: Has a clear internal code; doesn't bend it for convenience

traits.name: Protective
traits.desc: Moves instinctively to shield others from harm

traits.name: Quick-thinking
traits.desc: Performs well under time pressure; decisions are fast and serviceable

traits.name: Rational
traits.desc: Doesn't let emotion veto useful information

traits.name: Reliable
traits.desc: Does what they say; can be counted on without follow-up

traits.name: Resilient
traits.desc: Recovers from setbacks without lasting damage to function

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.desc: Finds a way with whatever is available

traits.name: Responsible
traits.desc: Owns outcomes, including bad ones; doesn't deflect accountability

traits.name: Selfless
traits.desc: Accepts personal cost to benefit others without resentment

traits.name: Sensitive
traits.desc: Attuned to emotional undercurrents in people and places

traits.name: Sincere
traits.desc: Means what they say; performance and intention match

traits.name: Spirited
traits.desc: Brings energy and conviction; hard to demoralize

traits.name: Steadfast
traits.desc: Doesn't waver when pressure mounts; holds their position without aggression

traits.name: Strategic
traits.desc: Thinks several moves ahead; considers second-order effects

traits.name: Tenacious
traits.desc: Holds on past the point where most would let go

traits.name: Thorough
traits.desc: Doesn't declare done until it actually is

traits.name: Tolerant
traits.desc: Extends good faith to people who differ from them

traits.name: Trustworthy
traits.desc: Keeps confidence; doesn't leverage others' vulnerabilities

traits.name: Versatile
traits.desc: Performs competently across a wider range than their specialty suggests

traits.name: Vigilant
traits.desc: Stays alert; doesn't let guard down in the absence of obvious threat

traits.name: Warm
traits.desc: Easy to be around; makes people feel welcome without effort

traits.name: Wise
traits.desc: Applies experience correctly; knows what applies and what doesn't

traits.name: Witty
traits.desc: Sharp and quick; finds the right word at the right moment

traits.name: Zealous
traits.desc: Commits fully; brings intensity others sometimes find uncomfortable

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: Escalates confrontations; default response to resistance is force

traits.name: Apathetic
traits.desc: Difficult to motivate; doesn't engage unless personally affected

traits.name: Arrogant
traits.desc: Overestimates their own competence; dismisses input from others

traits.name: Callous
traits.desc: Indifferent to others' suffering; treats people as means

traits.name: Cowardly
traits.desc: Freezes or retreats at critical moments; avoids necessary risk

traits.name: Cynical
traits.desc: Assumes bad faith by default; sabotages cooperation before it starts

traits.name: Deceptive
traits.desc: Uses false impressions strategically; truth is a tool, not a value

traits.name: Defiant
traits.desc: Resists authority reflexively; compliance feels like defeat

traits.name: Dishonest
traits.desc: Lies when truth is inconvenient; unreliable narrator of their own actions

traits.name: Distrustful
traits.desc: Assumes others are concealing motives; hard to integrate into a team

traits.name: Erratic
traits.desc: Behavior shifts unpredictably; hard to rely on under stress

traits.name: Fearful
traits.desc: Threat-response dominates decision-making; avoidance over engagement

traits.name: Greedy
traits.desc: Acquires disproportionately; unwilling to share resources or credit

traits.name: Impulsive
traits.desc: Acts before thinking; corrections are always reactive, never proactive

traits.name: Inconsistent
traits.desc: Standards and commitments vary by mood; can't be predicted

traits.name: Irresponsible
traits.desc: Doesn't own outcomes; blame is always external

traits.name: Jealous
traits.desc: Resents others' success or relationships; acts to undermine them

traits.name: Manipulative
traits.desc: Shapes others' perceptions and decisions through indirect means

traits.name: Narcissistic
traits.desc: Treats every situation as a referendum on their own importance

traits.name: Obsessive
traits.desc: Fixates on specific ideas or targets; can't redirect without friction

traits.name: Paranoid
traits.desc: Perceives threats where none exist; trust is inaccessible

traits.name: Pessimistic
traits.desc: Defaults to expecting failure; drains group morale over time

traits.name: Reckless
traits.desc: Accepts risk without calculating it; endangers others as a side effect

traits.name: Sarcastic
traits.desc: Default mode is cutting; uses humor as a weapon rather than a bridge

traits.name: Selfish
traits.desc: Personal benefit consistently outweighs group welfare in their choices

traits.name: Short-tempered
traits.desc: Loses composure quickly; reactions are disproportionate to triggers

traits.name: Stubborn
traits.desc: Doesn't update when wrong; holds positions past the evidence

traits.name: Vengeful
traits.desc: Remembers slights; acts on them when opportunity arrives

traits.name: Volatile
traits.desc: Emotional state can shift rapidly; unpredictable under stress

traits.name: Cold
traits.desc: Withholds warmth deliberately; emotional distance is a default setting
